mapper.sql: id, report_name, report_subject, report_cycle, report_state, place_num, scenic_passenger, create_user, create_time, update_time, is_delete
mapper.insert: insert into big_data_reports (id, report_name, report_subject, report_cycle, report_state, place_num, scenic_passenger, create_user, create_time, update_time, is_delete) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportSubject,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{placeNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scenicPassenger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into big_data_reports
id,
report_name,
report_subject,
report_cycle,
report_state,
place_num,
scenic_passenger,
create_user,
create_time,
update_time,
is_delete,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reportName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportSubject,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reportCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{placeNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{scenicPassenger,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update big_data_reports
report_name = #{reportName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_subject = #{reportSubject,jdbcType=INTEGER},
report_cycle = #{reportCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_state = #{reportState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
place_num = #{placeNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scenic_passenger = #{scenicPassenger,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update big_data_reports set report_name = #{reportName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, report_subject = #{reportSubject,jdbcType=INTEGER}, report_cycle = #{reportCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, report_state = #{reportState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, place_num = #{placeNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scenic_passenger = #{scenicPassenger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into big_data_reports (report_name, report_subject, report_cycle, report_state, place_num, scenic_passenger, create_user, create_time, update_time, is_delete) values (#{reportName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportSubject,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{placeNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scenicPassenger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: select bdr.place_num as placeNum,bdr.scenic_passenger as scenicPassenger,bdrc.report_content_part as reportContent from big_data_reports bdr LEFT JOIN big_data_reports_content bdrc ON bdr.id = bdrc.pt_big_data_reports_id where id = #{reportId}

SELECT psr.city as cityName,SUM(psr.`index`) as passengerCount FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 2 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.province = #{provinceName} AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.city ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT psr.city as city,SUM(psr.`index`) as count FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 2 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.province = #{provinceName} AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.city ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT psr.province as provinceName,SUM(psr.`index`) as passengerCount FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 1 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.province ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT psr.province as province,SUM(psr.`index`) as count FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 1 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.province ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT psr.city as cityName,SUM(psr.`index`) as passengerCount FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 2 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.city ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT psr.city as city,SUM(psr.`index`) as count FROM aone_passenger_hw_source_region psr WHERE psr.`level` = 2 AND psr.position_type = 1 AND psr.date_log BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY psr.city ORDER BY psr.`index` desc

SELECT lydmc as areaName,SUM(rs) as totalPeople FROM pt_tourists_source WHERE rdate BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND nwblx = #{nwblx} AND LEFT(lyddm,2) !=33 GROUP BY LEFT(lyddm,2) ORDER BY totalPeople DESC limit 5

SELECT LEFT(lydmc,2) as areaName,SUM(rs) as totalPeople FROM pt_tourists_source WHERE rdate BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND nwblx = '内宾' AND LEFT(lyddm,2) !=33 GROUP BY LEFT(lyddm,2) ORDER BY totalPeople DESC limit 5

SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN newdm=33 THEN 0 ELSE res.totalPepole END)/SUM(res.totalPepole)) as outProvince FROM( SELECT LEFT(lyddm,2) as newdm,nwblx,lydmc,SUM(rs) as totalPepole FROM pt_tourists_source WHERE nwblx = '内宾' and rdate BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY newdm )res
SELECT nwblx,SUM(rs) as totalPepole FROM pt_tourists_source GROUP BY nwblx

SELECT RIGHT(LEFT(lydmc,6),3) as areaName, SUM(rs) as totalPeople FROM `pt_tourists_source` WHERE `lyddm` LIKE '33%' and rdate BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND `nwblx` = '内宾' GROUP BY LEFT(lyddm,4) ORDER BY totalPeople DESC LIMIT 5
